name: Chocolate Cream Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1 package (1 oz) Low cal pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the pudding mix and skim milk. Microwave at HIGH for 5-7 minutes, stirring every minute or until slightly thickened.
2. Stir in the Grand Mariner and butter flavoring. Cover the top of the pudding with wax paper and let cool to room temperature.
3. In another small bowl, beat egg whites with Fructose until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cooled pudding mixture.
5. Spoon the mousse into serving dishes and chill until ready to serve.
6. Serve with low-calorie whipped topping.
